assertions.assertion: Output registers AddStackExchangeRedisCache with a Redis connection string for the distributed L2 cache tier
Output sets CacheLifetimeBuffer to 120 in the AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement options
Output implements IHybridCacheSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken> using IDataProtector for encryption
Output registers the custom serializer via AddHybridCache().AddSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken, ...>()
Output calls AddDataProtection() to enable the data protection provider
